---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug or issue
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Run command: `/generate-xray-tests PROJ-XXX`
2. Select test format (BDD or Manual)
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include any error messages.

## Environment

- JIRA CLI version: [e.g., 1.5.0 - run `jira version`]
- Operating System: [e.g., macOS 14.0, Ubuntu 22.04]
- X-Ray version: [if known]
- Claude Code version: [if applicable]

## JIRA Ticket Details

- Ticket ID: [e.g., PROJ-123]
- Does ticket have acceptance criteria? [Yes/No]
- Acceptance criteria format: [Description/Custom field/Sub-tasks]

## Error Output

```
Paste any error messages or unexpected output here
```

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here, such as:
- Screenshots
- Relevant JIRA configuration
- X-Ray settings
- Previous successful runs
